prompt: I have a scanned PDF document at ./scans/old-contract.pdf. The text isn't selectable because it's a scan. I need to: (1) try extracting text first to confirm it's a scan, (2) then OCR the document to get the text content with confidence scores in JSON format, (3) also extract any images from the document and save them as JPEG files in ./contract-images/. Use 600 DPI for the OCR to get better accuracy since the scan quality might be poor.
